subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-05 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The love I cherish for the German friends is so intense that were a flame of this love to touch them, they would be set ablaze completely
subcodes.first_line_orig: من باحبای آلمان آنقدر محبت دارم که اگر شعله ئی از این محبت بانها خور
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
